title: Fractions
summary: Fractions represent selected equal parts of a whole.
claim: Fractions represent quantities formed by dividing a whole into equal parts and selecting some number of those parts.
proof: If a whole is divided into b equal parts and a of those parts are selected, the selected quantity is represented as a/b.
validation: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
reconstruction: Can be rediscovered by cutting, folding, or dividing physical objects into equal parts.

proof_layers.summary: Fractions represent selected equal parts of a whole.

proof_layers.formal_or_structural_proof: If a whole is divided into b equal parts and a of those parts are selected, the selected quantity is represented as a/b.
